a.xlink:title: Contains the bulk of the definitions for the various LED chipsets supported.
defines the templated version of the CLEDController class
Low level pixel data writing class.
Includes defintions for RGB and HSV pixels.
central include file for FastLED, defines the CFastLED class/object
Internal FastLED header for implementation files.
UCS7604 LED chipset controller implementation for FastLED.
Serial peripheral interface (SPI) definitions per platform.
Functions to limit the power used by FastLED.
Phase 3b templated channel facade – Channel<Bus, Chipset> with compile-time bus/chipset enforcement.
Demonstrates FxEngine for switching between effects.
base definitions used by led controllers for writing out led data
WS2801/WS2803 SPI chipset encoder (pixel iterator adapter)
